# PuLoadingState

## Intent

- loading state
- region loading
- page loading
- visible loading message

## Prefer When

- Use for page or region loading states that need a visible spinner with optional title and message.

## Avoid When

- Avoid for inline control loading; use PuSpinner directly or PuButton loading state.

## Import

```ts
import { PuLoadingState } from '@partner-up-dev/ui-web'
```

## Props

- `as`
- `title`
- `message`
- `label`
- `compact`
- `busy`
- `align`
- `size`
- `surfaceLevel`
- `variant`

## Slots

- `default`
- `spinner`
- `title`

## Events

- No emitted events extracted.

## Composition

- PuSpinner
- PuCard
- PuPageScaffold

## Story Variants

Story: `src/stories/display/PuLoadingState.story.vue`

- Default
- Title And Message
- Surface
- Compact Start Aligned
- Custom Spinner Slot

## Types

- `PuLoadingStateAlign`
- `PuLoadingStateSize`
- `PuLoadingStateSurfaceLevel`
- `PuLoadingStateVariant`

## Caveats

- The default surface is plain for page-level use; set surfaceLevel and variant when the loading state should be framed as a section.
- Uses status semantics and aria-busy while busy; provide message, title, or label so the loading state has useful accessible text.
